title: HUT Stock Earnings: Hut 8 Mining Beats EPS, Misses Revenue for Q2 2024
text: Hut 8 Mining Q2 2024 Earnings Analysis. EPS Beat: Hut 8 Mining delivered earnings per share of 2 cents, surpassing the analyst projection of -3 cents. Revenue Miss: The company generated $35.22 million in revenue, falling significantly short of the $65.47 million estimate, which was 46.21% worse than analyst expectations. Revenue increase: 72% to $35.2 million compared to the prior year period. Digital Assets Mining segment: Gross margins rose to 46% from 34% year-over-year. Bitcoin mined: 279 Bitcoin during the quarter. Bitcoin holdings: 9,102 self-mined Bitcoin as of June 30, 2024, valued at approximately $570.5 million. Net loss: $71.9 million, primarily due to losses on digital assets fair value adjustment of $71.8 million. Market implications: Mixed results create complex picture. While Hut 8 Mining demonstrated profitability on per-share basis, dramatic revenue miss suggests operational or market challenges. Cryptocurrency mining sector volatility likely contributed to revenue underperformance.
